title: [sp:03-plan] Create implementation plan for attractor-temporal
description:
**Spec**: specs/001-attractor-kanban/spec.md
**Research (grounded)**: specs/001-attractor-kanban/research-hermes-kanban.md
**Skills**: /prefactoring, /latent-features, /glossary, /ddd-domain-modeling, /error-handling-patterns
**Context**: Generate plan.md + data-model.md + port contracts from the verified research note. Three former unknowns are now resolved (run advancement via post_tool_call hook + reconcile/replay over task_events; per-node model = per-node profile; goal-gate loops via dynamic acyclic iteration cards). Design: DOT parse/emit, deterministic traversal reducer, plugin-owned durable state DB (plugin_runs/plugin_run_nodes), kanban execution adapter with idempotency keys, gate result schema. No Temporal.
**Residual risks to settle**: post_tool_call ordering vs running-exit protocol_violation guard; exact kanban create/REST field names on installed version; reconcile trigger (auxiliary_task vs profile cron); hermes_agent.plugins entry-point reconciliation.
**Acceptance**: plan.md documents all technical decisions, file structure, and resolves residual risks
close_reason: Plan complete: created plan.md, research.md, data-model.md, contracts/ (ports.md, tools.md, card-result.schema.json), quickstart.md. Encoded verified decisions D1-D6/R-EP; resolved deferred-to-planning questions; documented residual risks R1-R4.

title: [sp:04-red-team] Perform adversarial review for attractor-temporal
description:
**Spec**: specs/001-attractor-kanban/spec.md, plan.md
**Context**: Adversarial review; enhance plan.md with security, edge cases (graph cycles, goal-gate loops on an acyclic kanban DAG, parallel merge conflicts, lost/duplicate completion events), performance, failure modes.
**Acceptance**: plan.md enhanced with adversarial findings
close_reason: Iterative red-team complete: 3 outer iteration(s), HEAD advanced from 1debf873bf02359b10287165c96c6cc98bd0ade9 to ebaac14093c844a7400fc2f928b3f03f62ae0a9a
